title: Supplementary Villages
description: Aims to make villages feel more alive using content from the Supplementaries mod
body:
- This datapack **requires** the [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries) and [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments) mods to work properly!
## About
This datapack aims to make villages feel more alive with content from the Supplementaries mod and also blend Supplementaries into the world more and teach players about it's features. 
## Changes
All village types are changed
- Workstation buildings have hanging signs showing the building's purpose
- Changed most interiors of buildings, some have multiple variants that get chosen randomly. This affects mainly the workstation buildings, temples (churches) and houses

For a look at the described changes, check the gallery!
